mapper.sql: id, username, name, password, avatar, company, department, position, project, content, salary_mode, hourly_rate, fixed_monthly_salary, overtime_hourly_rate, allowance, performance_bonus, deduction, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, name, password, avatar, company, department, position, project, content, salary_mode, hourly_rate, fixed_monthly_salary, overtime_hourly_rate, allowance, performance_bonus, deduction, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{name}, #{password}, #{avatar}, #{company}, #{department}, #{position}, #{project}, #{content}, #{salaryMode}, #{hourlyRate}, #{fixedMonthlySalary}, #{overtimeHourlyRate}, #{allowance}, #{performanceBonus}, #{deduction}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, name = #{name}, password = #{password}, avatar = #{avatar}, company = #{company}, department = #{department}, position = #{position}, project = #{project}, content = #{content}, salary_mode = #{salaryMode}, hourly_rate = #{hourlyRate}, fixed_monthly_salary = #{fixedMonthlySalary}, overtime_hourly_rate = #{overtimeHourlyRate}, allowance = #{allowance}, performance_bonus = #{performanceBonus}, deduction = #{deduction}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
